steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “one such publication that inspired readers to relocate” reveals the North Star as an example of what the blank verb describes — it motivated people to move west.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: The passage needs a word meaning to encourage westward movement. Stimulated — meaning to excite into action — perfectly captures what the North Star accomplished through its gold rush coverage. The other choices fail: opposed reverses this meaning, while assigned and disregarded make no sense applied to migration. That matches choice A — A is correct.
